case_title: BEHMKE REPORTING AND VIDEO SERVICES INC. VS. LAW OFFICE OF SCOTT L. WOODALL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BEHMKE REPORTING AND VIDEO SERVICES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LAW OFFICE OF SCOTT L. WOODALL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BEHMKE REPORTING AND VIDEO SERVICES INC.
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR VENUE HEARING ON COURT'S OWN MOTION HEARING SET FOR SEP-21-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BEHMKE REPORTING AND VIDEO SERVICES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LAW OFFICE OF SCOTT L. WOODALL
ORDER RE CONTINUANCE AND VENUE HEARING (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-30-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-25-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE COURT IS CONCERNED THAT VENUE DOES NOT LIE IN SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY. (SEE C.C.P. 395(A), 395.5, 116.370(C)(1).) PLAINTIFF SHALL PROVIDE FURTHER INFORMATION TO THE COURT CONCERNING VENUE BY SEPTEMBER 21, 2018 OR SHALL APPEAR AT HEARING ON SEPTEMBER 21, 2018 AT 3:30PM TO ADDRESS VENUE. IN THE EVENT PLAINTIFF SATISFIES THE COURT'S CONCERNS PRIOR TO THE SEPTEMBER 21, 2018 HEARING, THE COURT SHALL VACATE THE VENUE HEARING DATE AND SHALL PROCEED WITH TRIAL ON THE PREVIOUSLY CALENDARED DATE OF OCTOBER 25, 2018, AT 1:30PM. IN THE EVENT THE COURT DETERMINES VENUE IS NOT PROPER, THE COURT WILL DISMISS THE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO PLAINTIFF'S REFILING THE ACTION IN THE PROPER COUNTY WITHIN THE LIMITATIONS PERIOD FOR ITS ACTION. PLAINTIFF APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY ROISIN LINDSAY, ACCOUNTING REP. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
FILED LETTER FROM ALLISON WOODALL, PERSONAL REPRESENTATIVE OF THE ESTATE OF SCOTT L. WOODALL.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LAW OFFICE OF SCOTT L. WOODALL

VENUE HEARING ON COURT'S OWN MOTION ON SEP-21-2018 - DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. OCTOBER 25TH TRIAL DATE REMAINS IN EFFECT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF BEHMKE REPORTING AND VIDEO SERVICES, INC. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT SCOTT L. WOODALL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASED DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
ORDER RE: COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR IMPROPER VENUE IS DENIED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
